case_title: P. V. VS. DOE 1, DIOCESE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:HEARING HELD: EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SEAL CERTIFICATE OF MERIT - DENIED. REGULAR NOTICED MOTION REQUIRED.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-14-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF P. V.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE IS GRANTED. THE APPLICANT IS ALERTED THAT, GIVEN THE NUMBER OF CALIFORNIA CASES COUNSEL IS ABOUT TO BE INVOLVED IN, ANY FUTURE APPLICATION FOR PRO HAC VICE STATUS MUST INCLUDE AN ESTIMATE UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY OF THE APPROXIMATE PERCENTAGE OF WORK ON AN ANNUAL BASIS SPENT ON MATTERS IN ANY CALIFORNIA COURT. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF P. V. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF P. V.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is Granted. The applicant is alerted that, given the number of California cases counsel is about to be involved in, any future application for pro hac vice status must include an estimate under penalty of perjury of the approximate percentage of work on an annual basis spent on matters in any California court.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/CK)
